explanation: Removed quotes around the INF file path since the path does not contain spaces and is still parsed correctly.
Changed the file extension to uppercase (.INF) to test case insensitivity in file parsing.
Appended a harmless command after the main command using && to test if the detection rule captures only the relevant part.
Added trailing spaces to test if the detection rule is affected by unnecessary whitespace.
Used the original command without any modification to serve as a baseline for comparison.
